title: Desktop tool parity upgrade: region zoom, click modifiers/verify, focus screenshot, and UIA text tool swap
summary: Implement five desktop automation upgrades by extending existing tools and replacing desktop_vision_act with desktop_get_window_text. This adds region-based screenshot zoom, modifier-assisted clicks, post-action verification screenshots, focus+snapshot convenience, and native window text extraction for cleaner automation loops.
details:
## Why this change
Prometheus desktop automation is strong but still misses key ergonomics needed for reliable multi-monitor and precision workflows. The largest gap is lack of region-level zoom for full virtual desktop captures, which makes small UI targets hard to interpret on 2–3 monitor setups. Additional gaps (modifier clicks, optional verification screenshot, and focus+snapshot in one call) currently force repeated extra tool calls and increase failure/retry loops. Finally, `desktop_vision_act` is mostly a screenshot wrapper and duplicates existing capability; replacing it with `desktop_get_window_text` provides materially new value using Windows UI Automation text extraction with less OCR noise.

## Exact source edits
1) `src/gateway/desktop-tools.ts`
- Extend screenshot options/parsing:
  - Update `DesktopScreenshotOptions` (near current lines 63–67) to include optional `region` tuple `[x1, y1, x2, y2]`.
  - Update `parseDesktopScreenshotToolArgs` (near 75–88) to parse and validate `region`.
- Implement region crop in screenshot pipeline:
  - In `captureScreenshotInternal` / `desktopScreenshot` flow (near 511–598 and 741–835), apply region clamp/crop against capture bounds and emit cropped artifact.
  - Include region metadata in returned summary fields.
- Extend click args/behavior:
  - Update pointer parsing helpers (near 90–101) or add dedicated click parser for new args `modifier` and `verify`.
  - In `desktopClick` (near 870–904), add modifier key down/up around click execution (`shift|ctrl|alt|none`) with `finally` release safety.
  - If `verify=true`, perform ~300ms wait and capture post-click screenshot; include screenshot payload in result.
- Extend focus behavior:
  - Update `desktopFocusWindow` (near 853–868) to accept optional `screenshot` boolean; when true capture and return focused-window screenshot in same tool response.
- Replace vision wrapper tool:
  - Remove/retire `desktop_vision_act` tool registration and implementation wiring.
  - Add `desktop_get_window_text` tool function that accepts a window selector (title/process match semantics aligned with existing focus/find APIs), extracts visible UI Automation text, and returns normalized structured/plain text.
- Update tool schemas in the same file:
  - `desktop_screenshot` schema (near 1514–1531): add `region`.
  - `desktop_click` schema (near 1566–1583): add `modifier`, `verify`.
  - `desktop_focus_window` schema (near 1552–1559): add `screenshot`.
  - Replace `desktop_vision_act` schema with `desktop_get_window_text` schema.

2) `src/tools/desktop.ts`
- Update exported JSON schemas and execute wrappers:
  - `desktopScreenshotTool` (near 41–53): include `region`.
  - `desktopClickTool` (near 114–136): include `modifier`, `verify`.
  - `desktopFocusWindowTool` (near 90–103): include `screenshot`.
  - Add `desktopGetWindowTextTool`; remove `desktopVisionActTool`.
- Update execute call signatures and pass-throughs:
  - screenshot execute path (near 55–60), click execute path (137–146), focus execute path (104–108), plus new window text path.

3) `src/gateway/agents-runtime/subagent-executor.ts`
- Update tool dispatch cases:
  - `desktop_screenshot` (near 1517–1521): pass new region argument.
  - `desktop_click` (near 1531–1538): pass modifier/verify args.
  - `desktop_focus_window` (near 1526–1530): pass screenshot flag.
  - Replace `desktop_vision_act` case with `desktop_get_window_text` case.

4) `src/gateway/routes/chat.router.ts`
- In auto-screenshot-after-action section (near 2588–2616), coordinate with `desktop_click verify=true`:
  - Either suppress the router auto-screenshot when click tool already returned verification screenshot, or allow but dedupe attachments.
  - Ensure no double-image spam for single click actions.

5) Optional docs/help text updates (if present in repo)
- Update tool reference docs to remove `desktop_vision_act` and document `desktop_get_window_text`, plus new params on screenshot/click/focus tools.

## Deterministic behavior after patch
- `desktop_screenshot`:
  - Without `region`: existing behavior unchanged.
  - With `region`: returns a cropped screenshot clamped to valid capture bounds, at full resolution for that region.
- `desktop_click`:
  - `modifier` default behaves as current plain click.
  - Modifier click performs deterministic key-down -> click -> key-up sequence.
  - `verify=true` returns a post-click screenshot captured after a fixed delay.
- `desktop_focus_window`:
  - Existing focus behavior remains default.
  - `screenshot=true` adds immediate screenshot result from same call.
- Tool set changes:
  - `desktop_vision_act` no longer available.
  - `desktop_get_window_text` available and returns extracted text for matched window.
- Chat auto-screenshot integration remains deterministic and non-duplicative for click verify path.

## Acceptance tests
1. Screenshot region crop
- Call `desktop_screenshot` with `capture:"all"` and valid `region` across multi-monitor coordinates.
- Assert response indicates crop region and returned image dimensions match region extents after clamping.
- Call without region and verify legacy behavior unchanged.

2. Modifier clicks
- Use `desktop_click` with `modifier:"ctrl"` on a test target that reacts to Ctrl+click.
- Verify action path succeeds and modifier is released after click (no sticky modifier state).

3. Click verify image
- Call `desktop_click` with `verify:true`.
- Assert tool response includes a fresh post-click screenshot payload.
- Validate chat router does not attach a duplicate second screenshot for same action.

4. Focus with screenshot
- Call `desktop_focus_window` with `screenshot:true`.
- Verify focused window changes and screenshot attachment returned in same response.

5. Window text extraction
- Call new `desktop_get_window_text` on a window with known visible text (e.g., Notepad sample text).
- Verify text is returned in clean structured/plain output with minimal OCR artifacts.

6. Regression checks
- Ensure `desktop_find_window`, `desktop_click`, `desktop_type`, `desktop_scroll`, and other desktop tools still execute normally.
- Build passes with no type errors.

## Risks and compatibility
- Removing `desktop_vision_act` is a breaking change for any prompt/workflow hardcoded to that tool name. Mitigation: add compatibility alias period or clear migration note.
- UI Automation extraction can fail on non-standard or elevated windows; tool should return explicit diagnostics rather than hard-fail runtime.
- Region cropping must correctly map virtual-screen coordinates (including negative monitor offsets); incorrect math can produce blank/shifted crops.
- Modifier handling must always release key in `finally` to avoid stuck keyboard state.
- Verify screenshots could increase response payload size; default remains off to preserve existing performance.

affectedFiles.description: Add region crop support, click modifier/verify, focus screenshot option, and replace desktop_vision_act with desktop_get_window_text
Update desktop tool schemas/wrappers for new params and tool replacement
Pass through new desktop tool args and update renamed tool dispatch case
Prevent duplicate auto-screenshot attachment when click verify screenshot is already returned
Document new/changed desktop tool parameters and deprecate desktop_vision_act (if docs file exists)

estimatedImpact: Higher desktop action reliability on multi-monitor setups, fewer round trips per action, cleaner text extraction from native apps, and improved operator speed with no net increase in tool count.
executorPrompt: Execute the approved proposal exactly as written. Edit the specified src files to add desktop_screenshot region cropping, desktop_click modifier+verify behavior, desktop_focus_window screenshot option, replace desktop_vision_act with desktop_get_window_text, and coordinate chat router auto-screenshot dedupe. Preserve backward compatibility defaults, run TypeScript build, and report precise changed lines and any follow-up migration notes.
